temporal_description: A close-up shot focuses on a man with a deeply scarred and disfigured face, his mouth open in a snarl. He is in a very dark environment, illuminated only from the front, casting deep shadows. The audio is a chaotic and intense soundscape of a large-scale battle. It begins with a deep, guttural, and monstrous roar, filled with aggression and pain. The camera is shaky, suggesting a chaotic or violent moment. In the top right corner, the white Chinese characters "风行网" are visible. This is immediately followed by a cacophony of sounds, including the sharp clang of metal on metal, the crackle of fire, and the indistinct, powerful shouts of a large crowd. The camera pans across a dark, crowded scene, revealing a large army of figures standing in formation. They are silhouetted against the darkness, with some holding what appear to be torches or fires, casting a warm, flickering light. The atmosphere is tense and foreboding. The "风行网" text remains in the top right corner. The camera continues to pan, showing a long line of the silhouetted army stretching into the distance. The figures are gathered in a large, dark space, possibly a courtyard or a field at night, with the warm glow of fires dotting the scene. In the background, the faint outlines of large, gothic-style buildings are visible. The "风行网" text is still present in the top right corner. The overall effect is one of immense, violent energy and conflict, creating a sense of a powerful and dangerous confrontation. There is no narration or dialogue in the audio.
